Example Domain

This fixture directory is used by Guarantee_Agent tests.

Available fixtures

  • form.html — form fill, submit, scroll, wait-for-element
  • login.html — login form with success redirect and error message
  • dashboard.html — post-login page with data table, sort, pagination, logout
  • validation.html — required-field and inline-error validation
  • search.html — live client-side search/filter
  • inputs.html — checkboxes, radios, date, range, textarea, select
  • modal.html — confirm dialog open / cancel / confirm
  • tabs.html — tabbed panels and per-tab interactions
  • loading.html — async spinner and delayed element
  • notfound.html — 404 error page

Set AUTOQA_BASE_URL to the URL serving this directory.
